name.value: Chiang Mai Green Valley Country Club

designer.note: Attributed by multiple sources. Needs direct confirmation from course.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: BLOCKER: Not confirmed via web research. Requires direct phone/email contact with course.

prose.overview: Chiang Mai Green Valley Country Club is an 18-hole, par-72 golf course in the Mae Rim district north of Chiang Mai city. It is a separate facility from the nearby Summit Green Valley Chiangmai Country Club, which shares a similar name and general location. Both courses are in the Mae Rim area and reportedly share a designer (Dennis Griffiths) and a founding era around 1990. The course is characterised by open fairways, extensive water hazards on nearly every hole, and numerous bunkers. It draws primarily local Chiang Mai golfers. NOTE: Multiple required fields remain unconfirmed — this course cannot be published without direct verification.
prose.layout_and_experience: Based on available review sources, the course presents an open parkland character with minimal tree shelter. Water hazards are a constant feature throughout the round. The 18-hole layout stretches to approximately 7,200 yards from the back tees to par 72. Specific hole-by-hole character details are not available without visiting the course.
prose.tips: Contact the club directly before visiting to confirm current green fees, opening hours, and caddie/cart requirements. The Mae Rim location is convenient to combine with other activities in the valley. Early morning rounds are recommended during the hot season.
prose.location_and_access: Chiang Mai Green Valley Country Club is located in the Mae Rim district, approximately 15–20 kilometres north of Chiang Mai city centre. Visitors from Bangkok fly to Chiang Mai International Airport (CNX), a journey of approximately 1 hour 10 minutes — driving the 700 kilometres from Bangkok is not practical. The course is reachable by Grab taxi from Chiang Mai city along Route 107 north.
prose.rental_cta_context: Planning a round at Chiang Mai Green Valley Country Club on your Northern Thailand golf visit? Rent premium clubs in Bangkok — delivered to your hotel before you fly — so you arrive ready to play without worrying about airline baggage fees.
